query: Am I a morning person or a night person?

choices.C: You used to be a night person but became a morning person.
choices.D: Unresolved — your two most recent entries directly conflict with no later tiebreaker.

metadata.scoring_note: Genuinely unresolved: two entries one week apart directly conflict with no later tiebreaker. Tests calibrated abstention; picking A/B/C = false_resolution. Distractor d_0490 is older and does not resolve.
